channel.title: The Mutapa Times — Zimbabwe Property Listings
channel.description: Live Zimbabwe property listings with branded hybrid cards — photo on top, price and specs on the brand strip. One item per active listing for the Mutapa Times properties autolist.

item.title: USD 750,000 — Prime commercial opportunity on Churchill Ave (On Show) (Alexandra Park, Harare North)
item.description: USD 750,000 — Alexandra Park, Harare North. 4 beds, 3 baths. Prime commercial opportunity on Churchill Ave (On Show). Browse all listings at mutapatimes.com/property #Zimbabwe #Property #ZimbabweProperty #RealEstate #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Property.co.zw
